name: Proofpoint TAP
description: This App integrates with Proofpoint to implement ingestion and investigative actions

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Callback action for the On Poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds) (default is past 10 days)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds) (default is now)

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of container records to query for

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for

actions.name: Get Campaign Data
actions.description: Fetch detailed information for a given campaign (deprecated)

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Proofpoint campaign ID from other Proofpoint events

actions.name: Get Campaign
actions.description: Fetch detailed information for a given campaign

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Proofpoint campaign ID from other Proofpoint events

actions.name: Get Forensic Data
actions.description: Fetch forensic information for a given threat or campaign (deprecated)

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Proofpoint campaign ID from other Proofpoint events

parameters.name: threat_id
parameters.description: Proofpoint threat ID from other Proofpoint events

parameters.name: include_campaign_forensics
parameters.description: Include full campaign forensic data for a threat. This value is ignored for campaign queries

actions.name: Get Forensic
actions.description: Fetch forensic information for a given threat or campaign

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Proofpoint campaign ID from other Proofpoint events

parameters.name: threat_id
parameters.description: Proofpoint threat ID from other Proofpoint events

parameters.name: include_campaign_forensics
parameters.description: Include full campaign forensic data for a threat. This value is ignored for campaign queries

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: List of URL(s) to decode, comma separated
